title: Train Your AI Like You Would Train a Human Apprentice
summary: Most people give their agent one task, get a bad result, and conclude AI does not work. The reinforcement loop that fixes this.

title: Applied AI Community Leader
summary: The person who brings applied AI to their city, campus, or community. Open source playbooks for running events and building movements.

title: Always-On Agents
summary: The shift from AI that answers when asked to AI that works for you while you sleep. References KAIROS in Claude Code's source.

title: Signalmaxxing
summary: The deliberate curation of your information environment so that everything influencing your thinking is truth-seeking.

title: Agent-Accessible Products
summary: If agents cannot use your product, agents will replace your product. CLI-ify everything. API-ify everything.

title: The Minimum Viable Jarvis
summary: Battle-tested tutorial for setting up your AI business OS. Now with starter repo, trainer guide, and workshop format.

title: Personal Jarvis
summary: A personal AI system that operates from your context, compounds over time, and is owned entirely by you.

title: The Self-Improving Enterprise
summary: An enterprise designed so that its systems, processes, and documentation evolve on their own.
